title: The Physics OS: Compression-Native Computational Physics — Powered by The Ontic Engine
description: The Physics OS replaces dense numerical arrays with Quantized Tensor Trains (QTT) to run exascale simulations on commodity hardware. Powered by The Ontic Engine — a register-based bytecode VM where physics are compiled, executed, and constrained by conservation laws. ~2M LOC, 168 physics nodes, 20 industries, cryptographic trust certificates. Tigantic Holdings LLC, DBA HolonomiX.
notes: This software implements tensor network algorithms for quantum physics (Heisenberg, TFIM, Bose-Hubbard models) and CFD (1D/2D compressible Euler equations with Riemann solvers).
